closureCriteria.criterion: Terminal transaction families cover Read, Fit, proof, mint, BTC fee, AssetPack anchor, read license, order, transfer, dispute, and settlement finalization
evidence: packages/btd/src/terminal-journal.ts defines REQUIRED_TERMINAL_TRANSACTION_KINDS for the V27 Terminal family set
buildTerminalJournalCoverageReceipt emits a blocking receipt when any required family is missing
packages/btd/__tests__/v27-crypto-primitives.test.ts and protocol-demonstration/test/v27-crypto-primitives.test.js prove full coverage and missing-family blocking behavior

closureCriteria.criterion: journal entries carry stable ids, pre-state roots, post-state roots, receipt roots, and ledger anchor references
evidence: buildTerminalJournalEntry validates journalEntryId, transactionKind, actorId, preStateRoot, postStateRoot, receiptRoots, ledgerAnchorIds, positive Exchange sequence, and issuedAt
btd_terminal_journal_entries persists journal id, kind, actor, pre/post state roots, receipt roots, ledger anchor ids, Exchange sequence, and issued_at
btd_terminal_journal_kind and btd_terminal_journal_exchange_sequence SQL constraints fail closed on unsupported families or non-positive sequence

closureCriteria.criterion: journal diffing detects disagreement among Terminal intent, Exchange journal, ledger observation, database projection, and proof artifacts
evidence: diffTerminalJournalProjection blocks drift in journal id, post-state root, receipt roots, and ledger anchor ids
/api/btd/terminal-journal exposes diff_projection for commercial route-level drift checks
package/API tests prove stale post-state drift blocks before UI or API can claim finality

closureCriteria.criterion: commercial route is unversioned and commit-gated
evidence: packages/api/src/routes/btd-crypto.ts exposes /btd/terminal-journal with commit_entry, diff_projection, and coverage actions
uapi/app/api/btd/terminal-journal/route.ts binds the Next.js App Router endpoint without a versioned route prefix
registry writes occur only for commit_entry when commitToRegistry is explicitly true

validatedCommands.notes: Jest reports pre-existing duplicate manual mock warnings outside the V27 package/API slice.
Jest reports pre-existing duplicate manual mock warnings outside the V27 ORM slice.

nonPromotionAssertions: BITCODE_SPEC.txt remained V26 until Gate 16 promotion
BITCODE_SPEC_V27_PROVEN.md did not exist until Gate 16 promotion
Gate 13 closure does not claim every V28 Terminal workflow, live value-bearing product UX, generated V27 proof-family closure, or V27 promotion
All BTD API route paths remain unversioned
